title: AI — Anybuild
description: How Anybuild uses AI: inside the platform, with external tools, and in your apps—plus what AI does not control. The platform governs structure, validation, and runtime.

hero.subtagline: Works without AI. Faster with it.
hero.copyHtml:
AI helps build systems faster.
Anybuild keeps structure, rules, and lifecycle under control.

pipeline.title: AI input
pipeline.copy: Prompt, spec, SQL help, external tools.

pipeline.title: Anybuild
pipeline.copy: Model, rules, validation, and runtime stay in one place.

pipeline.title: System output
pipeline.copy: Production system that can be changed and extended over time.

internal.label: Internal AI
internal.title: Inside the platform
internal.copyHtml:
AI is built into the platform.
Used across requirements, model, SQL, and UI.

cards.title: Requirements
cards.body: Start from a prompt or upload a spec. Use AI to get to the first version faster.

cards.title: Model shaping
cards.body: Use AI during the early model phase, then refine manually before generation.

cards.title: SQL views
cards.body: Use AI to write and improve SQL views inside the platform.

cards.title: Initial system
cards.body: Use AI to create the first working version instead of starting from a blank system.

cards.title: UI components
cards.body: Use the internal AI UI builder to create components inside the platform.

cards.title: Safe changes
cards.body: AI suggestions are checked against the model. Changes that break structure or rules are adjusted or rejected.

external.label: External AI
external.title: Outside the platform
external.copyHtml:
Use external AI tools like Cursor, Claude Code, and similar.
Anybuild validates, normalizes, and runs the result.

cards.title: Use external tools
cards.body: Use tools like Cursor, Claude Code, and similar for UI work.

cards.title: Bring work back
cards.body: Artifacts come back into Anybuild instead of living outside the platform.

cards.title: Keep one system
cards.body: The system stays aligned with platform rules and structure.

inApp.label: AI in applications
inApp.title: Inside your applications
inApp.copyHtml:
Use AI as part of workflows and features.
Not just for building, but for running the system.

cards.title: Workflows and decisions
cards.body: Use AI in workflows for routing, decisions, and automation.

cards.title: Document processing
cards.body: Extract data from documents using OCR and structured parsing.

cards.title: Image recognition
cards.body: Classify and analyze images as part of business processes.

rules.label: What AI does not do
rules.title: AI does not run the system
rules.copyHtml:
AI helps create parts of the system.
Anybuild stays in control of how the system works.

compare.label: Compared to other AI tools
compare.title: Different by design
compare.copyHtml:
Other tools generate output.
Anybuild keeps systems structured and consistent.

cards.title: Prompt-based builders
cards.bodyHtml:
Generate apps quickly from prompts.
Hard to extend and keep consistent over time.

cards.title: Code generators
cards.bodyHtml:
Produce code with high flexibility.
No built-in structure or system rules.

cards.title: No-code tools with AI
cards.bodyHtml:
Mix manual building with AI help.
Still require setup and system design.

columns.title: Anybuild governs.
columns.body: Anybuild makes sure the result works as a real system.

sectionCta.copyHtml: Use AI where it saves time. Keep the platform in control from start to finish.
